docs.title: 🎯 What is OnePersonLab?
docs.text:
🤖 242 AI Agents

Virtual researchers across 11 disciplines

🧪 11 Disciplines

From Biology to Computer Science

⚡ Zero Setup

Just describe your research goal

🏗️ 4-Layer Hierarchy

Lab-Director → PI → Postdoc → (Students)

docs.title: 🔬 Disciplines
docs.text: 🖥️ Computer Science 🧪 Chemistry 🧬 Biology 🔩 Materials ⚙️ Engineering 🌍 Environmental 🌾 Agriculture 🏥 Medicine 📈 Economics 🧠 Psychology 📊 Data Science

docs.title: No Code. No Config. Just Talk.One SentenceInstant TeamZero Friction
docs.text:
💭

Describe your research goal

⚡

Agents self-organize automatically

🎯

No manual agent configuration

docs.title: Example Conversation
docs.text:
You: I need expertise in chemistry and biology 
     for drug discovery.

Lab-Director: Activating CHEM-PI, BIO-PI, and 
              12 specialized agents...
              Team ready! 🎉

That's it. Your virtual lab is open.
